name: prompt-fuel
description: Track AI coding assistant usage history and live quota status from the VS Code status bar.
author: TheKrush

commands.title: PromptFuel: Upgrade Snapshot Files to Current Schema

label.description: Display label used in expanded UI surfaces (dashboard, tooltips).

shortLabel.description: Short label used in compact/status-bar surfaces.

statusBar.description: Whether this source appears in the status bar summary.

promptFuel.sources.description: Unified source configuration. Each key is a source ID (e.g. "claude", "codex", or a snapshot source like "WATCHER/codex"). Controls enablement, display labels, and status bar visibility.

promptFuel.refreshIntervalMinutes.description: Minimum interval in minutes for periodic refresh. Applies to both local scanning and authenticated quota refresh.

promptFuel.stateDirectory.description: Directory for shared usage state. Empty uses %LOCALAPPDATA%/PromptFuel on Windows or ~/.prompt-fuel elsewhere.

promptFuel.claudeProjectsPath.description: Claude projects root for safe assistant-message Today aggregation. Empty uses ~/.claude/projects.

promptFuel.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: Fallback refresh interval. Event/file changes update faster when available.

promptFuel.authenticatedQuota.enabled.description: Enable opt-in live authenticated quota refresh using existing Claude/Codex product session credentials. No live calls are made when disabled.

promptFuel.statusMode.description: Show percentages as remaining allowance or consumed usage.

enumDescriptions: Standard: provider name, quota windows, and countdown.
Compact: shorter display with provider name and quota windows, no countdown.
promptFuel.statusBarDensity.description: Status bar display density. Standard shows countdowns and full labels. Compact is shorter.

promptFuel.snapshot.enabled.description: Enable opt-in local machine snapshot writer. When enabled, writes a sanitized snapshot to {stateDirectory}/snapshots/{machine}-latest.json on each refresh.

promptFuel.snapshot.machineLabel.description: Configured machine/source label for the snapshot. Used as the machine identity in the snapshot payload and as the filename component. Must not be a raw hostname. Defaults to 'unknown' if empty.

promptFuel.snapshot.path.description: Folder for compatible machine snapshots. When set, PromptFuel reads *-latest.json snapshots from this folder and, when snapshot writing is enabled, copies this machine's sanitized snapshot there.

scripts.smoke:ci: npm run smoke:surface && npm run smoke:display && npm run smoke:dashboard && npm run smoke:snapshots && npm run smoke:codex
scripts.smoke:display: node scripts/smoke-usage-threshold-levels.cjs && node scripts/smoke-status-tooltip.cjs && node scripts/smoke-model-breakdown-hover.cjs
scripts.smoke:dashboard: node scripts/smoke-dashboard-hide-disabled-providers.cjs && node scripts/smoke-chart-binning.cjs && node scripts/smoke-chart-tooltip.cjs && node scripts/smoke-dashboard-rendering.cjs && node scripts/smoke-dashboard-pricing-cards.cjs
scripts.test:unit: node --test out/test/config.test.js out/test/authenticatedQuota.test.js out/test/authenticatedStatus.test.js out/test/codexState.test.js out/test/displayFormat.test.js out/test/pricing.test.js out/test/quotaFallback.test.js out/test/refreshPolicy.test.js out/test/resetRefresh.test.js out/test/snapshotWriter.test.js out/test/snapshotReader.test.js out/test/statusBar.test.js out/test/tokenMath.test.js out/test/providerTabs.test.js out/test/usageHistoryBinning.test.js out/test/usageTime.test.js
